seo.title: 10 Best Hotels in Phitsanulok 2026 — Riverside, Budget & Luxury
seo.metaDescription: Find the best hotels in Phitsanulok for every budget. From riverside guesthouses to heritage hotels and spa resorts. Real prices and honest reviews for 2026.

intro: Phitsanulok offers genuinely good value accommodation across all budgets — a reflection of its status as an authentic provincial city rather than a tourist destination. Budget travelers find clean, central guesthouses for 300-600 THB near the railway station and riverside. Mid-range visitors choose riverside hotels with Nan River views at prices that would buy a hostel dorm in Bangkok. The luxury tier is modest compared to resort cities, but Yodia Heritage Hotel and Pattara Resort & Spa deliver quality well above their prices. Here are 10 hotels across all budgets — every one a real property with verified prices.

hotels.name: LiThai Guesthouse
hotels.description: A long-established backpacker favorite in a central location near Wat Yai and the Night Bazaar. Clean rooms with air conditioning in a traditional shophouse building with a welcoming courtyard. The adjacent Veggie Cafe is run by the same management and is highly regarded for its international menu of burgers, sandwiches, and fresh juices — a reliable retreat for travelers who need a break from Thai food. The owners are excellent sources of local information and organize day trips to Sukhothai.
highlights: Central location walkable to Wat Yai, Night Bazaar, and Nan River
Excellent in-house Veggie Cafe with international and Thai options
Helpful owners who organize Sukhothai day trips and local guidance

hotels.name: Poonsook Hotel
hotels.description: Outstanding value in a quiet side street near the bus terminal. Spacious, clean rooms with quality beds, air conditioning, satellite TV with English channels, writing desks, mini-fridges, and extra-large bathrooms with partitioned showers — facilities that many mid-range hotels fail to match at twice the price. Small balconies on most rooms. The location is slightly removed from the main tourist strip but very convenient for bus travel to Sukhothai and Kamphaeng Phet.
highlights: Exceptional room quality for the budget price point
Spacious rooms with reliable AC, mini-fridge, and large bathrooms
Quiet location near the bus terminal — convenient for day-trip departures

hotels.name: P1 House
hotels.description: A charming boutique guesthouse on a lively stretch of Phra Ong Dam Road near the Nan River. Rooms feature a thoughtful design mix of hardwood or tile floors, soft lamps, rattan and silk accents, polished cement, and modern hot-water bathrooms. The riverside location puts guests within easy walking distance of the Night Bazaar, flying vegetables restaurants, and houseboat dining options. A step up from typical budget accommodation without the mid-range price tag.
highlights: Riverside location on Phra Ong Dam Road near Night Bazaar and flying vegetables
Well-designed rooms with wooden accents and modern bathrooms
Walking distance to Nan River dining and evening entertainment

hotels.name: The Grand Riverside Hotel
hotels.description: A well-established mid-range hotel with a prime position directly in front of the Nan River. Comfortable rooms in a high-rise building with river or city views, reliable air conditioning, free Wi-Fi, and a restaurant serving Thai and Chinese cuisine on site. Walking distance to the Night Bazaar, Wat Yai, and the city's main attractions. Consistently solid reviews for cleanliness, helpful staff, and the unbeatable riverside setting.
highlights: Nan River frontage with rooms offering river views
Walking distance to Wat Yai, Night Bazaar, and riverside restaurants
On-site restaurant and reliable mid-range facilities

hotels.name: Topland Hotel & Convention Centre
hotels.description: Phitsanulok's largest hotel and the city's main business and events venue, with 4-star facilities in the heart of downtown. Spacious rooms with modern furnishings, multiple restaurants, a swimming pool, fitness center, and convention facilities. The central location puts guests within walking distance of the city's main commercial area and 5-10 minutes from Wat Yai and the riverside. Popular with both business travelers and families seeking reliable facilities.
highlights: Swimming pool and fitness center — uncommon at this price in Phitsanulok
Central downtown location with all amenities on site
Multiple dining options including Thai, Chinese, and international cuisine

hotels.name: Yodia Heritage Hotel
hotels.description: The most characterful hotel in Phitsanulok — a heritage property on the banks of the Nan River in the city center, within walking distance of Wat Yai and the Night Bazaar. Stylish rooms with wooden floors, private balconies, satellite TV, and coffee/tea facilities. The outdoor swimming pool and spa bath overlook the river. River-view rooms offer one of Phitsanulok's most atmospheric hotel experiences. Consistently rated as the best full-service hotel in the city.
highlights: Nan River frontage with outdoor pool and spa bath
Stylish heritage-style rooms with wooden floors and private balconies
Walking distance to Wat Yai, Chan Palace, and Night Bazaar

hotels.name: Amora Tapae Phitsanulok (formerly Amarin Lagoon)
hotels.description: A resort-style hotel set in landscaped grounds with a large swimming pool, 3 km north of the city center. The property has spacious rooms with modern furnishings, a restaurant, fitness center, and pool area that make it feel more like a resort than a city hotel. Suited to travelers with their own transport who want space and a pool rather than being in the middle of the city action. Shuttle services to town available.
highlights: Large landscaped pool in resort-style grounds
Spacious rooms with modern furnishings away from city noise
Good value for the facilities offered

hotels.name: Pattara Resort & Spa
hotels.description: Widely regarded as the best hotel in Phitsanulok, Pattara Resort & Spa is a beautifully landscaped property about 2 km from the Night Bazaar and 3 km from Phitsanulok Airport. The resort features a full-service spa with massages, body treatments, and facials; an outdoor pool and hot tub; a fitness center; and elegant Thai-style architecture set in manicured gardens. Rooms have the highest quality furnishings in the city, with some featuring private plunge pools. Genuinely luxurious by provincial Thai standards.
highlights: Full-service spa with massages, body treatments, and facials
Outdoor pool, hot tub, and fitness center in manicured grounds
Highest quality rooms in Phitsanulok — private plunge pools in some categories

hotels.name: The Imperial Hotel & Convention Centre Phitsanulok
hotels.description: A reliable Thai chain hotel in a central location with business-class facilities: swimming pool, fitness center, multiple restaurants, and a coffee shop. Rooms are well-maintained with good air conditioning and modern bathrooms. The convention center hosting is reflected in reliable service standards. Good choice for travelers wanting predictable quality at a reasonable price, within walking distance of the main attractions.
highlights: Central location with walking access to main attractions
Swimming pool and fitness center included
Reliable Thai chain standards with consistent service

hotels.name: Dragon River Avenue Hotel
hotels.description: A modern hotel in the southern university district, 10 km from the city center near Naresuan University. Popular with visiting academics and those attending the university hospital. The surrounding neighborhood has excellent cheap street food from university canteens and local restaurants. Rooms are modern with good facilities. Best for travelers with their own transport who want to be in a lively local area rather than the tourist center.
highlights: Modern rooms in a lively university district
Excellent cheap food options from student restaurants and local stalls nearby
Quieter neighborhood away from city center noise

bookingTips: Book Yodia Heritage Hotel and Pattara Resort well in advance for Thai public holidays (Songkran in April, King's Birthday in December) when domestic tourists fill the city
The city center riverside area (Phra Ong Dam Road and Buddharak Road) gives the best walking access to Wat Yai, Night Bazaar, and the flying vegetables restaurants
Budget travelers get exceptional value at Poonsook and LiThai — standards are genuinely higher than most Bangkok hostels at the same price
Phitsanulok has no peak tourist season the way beach towns do — prices are fairly consistent year-round with small dips in the low season (May-October)
Hotels near the railway station are most convenient for those traveling by train — the station is central and walking distance from most mid-range options
If using Phu Hin Rong Kla or Pattara Resort as your luxury option, ensure you have private transport arranged — these properties are set slightly away from the walkable center
